summary: Tested new LeadFinder features: merged LEADS tab with source toggle, EMAIL tab with automated email system, email stats in STATS dashboard. Fixed backend bug (KeyError: 'count' in send-email endpoint). All 16 backend API tests pass. All frontend features verified working on desktop and mobile.

issues: AnimatePresence warning: 'mode is set to wait' - minor console warning, doesn't affect functionality

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/leads/email-stats returns 200 with correct structure (vandaag, limiet, resterend, totaalVerstuurd, totaalGereageerd, emailableLeads)
BACKEND: POST /api/leads/email-stats updates daily limit (tested 30→40→30)
BACKEND: GET /api/leads returns list with emailStatus and emailSentAt fields
BACKEND: PATCH /api/leads updates emailStatus correctly
BACKEND: POST /api/leads/send-email requires leadId (returns 400)
BACKEND: POST /api/leads/send-email with invalid leadId returns 404
BACKEND: POST /api/leads/send-email for lead without email returns 400
BACKEND: POST /api/leads/send-batch returns 200/429/500 appropriately
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/leadfinder/auth with correct password succeeds
BACKEND: POST /api/admin/leadfinder/auth with wrong password fails
BACKEND: GET /api/admin/leadfinder/dashboard returns totaal_leads and status_verdeling
FRONTEND: Tab structure is ZOEKEN, LEADS, EMAIL, STATS, TOOLS (5 tabs, no separate CSV tab)
FRONTEND: LEADS tab has source toggle with 'CSV Leads' and 'Google Maps' buttons with count badges
FRONTEND: CSV Leads source shows all CSV leads with import/export/save/delete buttons
FRONTEND: EMAIL tab shows 'Email Campagne' header
FRONTEND: EMAIL tab shows 4 stat cards (Vandaag Verstuurd, Nog Te Versturen, Totaal Verstuurd, Gereageerd)
FRONTEND: EMAIL tab has configurable daily limit buttons (10, 20, 30, 40, 50)
FRONTEND: EMAIL tab shows Email Wachtrij with leads that have email addresses
FRONTEND: Each lead in wachtrij shows naam, email, source badge (CSV), emailStatus dropdown
FRONTEND: STATS tab shows Email Statistieken section with 4 cards
FRONTEND: Mobile (390px) layout works for all tabs including EMAIL tab
FRONTEND: All existing CSV leads preserved and accessible (4 leads: Salon Beauty, Nieuw Bedrijf, TEST_Legacy_1775593535, Test Kapper Email)
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed KeyError: 'count' bug in /api/leads/send-email and /api/leads/send-batch endpoints - changed daily['count'] to daily.get('count', 0)
Email automation uses Resend API with info@yrvante.com as sender - domain verification may be needed for production
Daily limit stored in MongoDB 'email_daily_log' collection with date, count, dailyLimit fields
Email status options: niet_verstuurd, verstuurd, gereageerd - correctly implemented in frontend dropdown
Prisma schema has CsvLead model with emailStatus and emailSentAt fields - matches MongoDB implementation
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed KeyError bug in send-email and send-batch endpoints (lines 1063, 1087, 1098)
/app/backend/tests/test_email_api.py - Created comprehensive email API test suite
seed_data_creation: 4 CSV leads exist: Salon Beauty, Nieuw Bedrijf, TEST_Legacy_1775593535, Test Kapper Email (with email test@example.com)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 41: Tested new email automation features. Key data-testids: email-tab-title, source-csv, source-maps, email-status-{leadId}, send-email-{leadId}. Email stats API: GET/POST /api/leads/email-stats. Send email: POST /api/leads/send-email with {leadId}. Batch send: POST /api/leads/send-batch. Daily limit default 30, configurable 10-50. 1 lead has email (test@example.com). Email sending via Resend may fail in preview (domain not verified). Fixed KeyError bug in send-email endpoint.

tab_structure.details: 5 tabs: ZOEKEN, LEADS, EMAIL, STATS, TOOLS. No separate CSV tab.

leads_source_toggle.details: LEADS tab has toggle between 'CSV Leads' (4) and 'Google Maps' (0) with count badges

email_tab.details: Shows Email Campagne header, 4 stat cards, daily limit buttons (10-50), Email Wachtrij

email_stats_api.details: GET returns vandaag, limiet, resterend, totaalVerstuurd, totaalGereageerd, emailableLeads. POST updates limit.

email_status_dropdown.details: Options: Niet verstuurd, Verstuurd, Gereageerd. Updates via PATCH /api/leads

stats_email_section.details: STATS tab shows Email Statistieken with 4 cards

mobile_layout.details: All tabs work on 390px viewport. Buttons wrap properly, cards in 2-column grid.

existing_leads_preserved.details: 4 CSV leads accessible: Salon Beauty, Nieuw Bedrijf, TEST_Legacy_1775593535, Test Kapper Email

bug_fixed.issue: KeyError: 'count' in send-email and send-batch endpoints
bug_fixed.root_cause: Code accessed daily['count'] directly instead of daily.get('count', 0) when email_daily_log document exists but may not have 'count' field
bug_fixed.fix: Changed daily['count'] to daily.get('count', 0) in lines 1063, 1087, 1098 of server.py
bug_fixed.verification: All 16 backend tests now pass including send-email with invalid leadId returning 404
